text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:40:20 2014
New Revision: 355210
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355210
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355210/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Add WWW
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189575
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-List-PowerSet/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-List-PowerSet/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/p5-List-PowerSet/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-List-PowerSet/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:40:15 2014	(r355209)
+++ head/devel/p5-List-PowerSet/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:40:20 2014	(r355210)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl module that allows you to generate the power set of a list
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
 

Modified: head/devel/p5-List-PowerSet/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-List-PowerSet/pkg-descr	Sun May 25 12:40:15 2014	(r355209)
+++ head/devel/p5-List-PowerSet/pkg-descr	Sun May 25 12:40:20 2014	(r355210)
@@ -1,2 +1,4 @@
 The List::PowerSet module is simple module that currently allows you to
 generate the power set of a list 
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/List-PowerSet/
